default_policy.core_promotion: Never promote image-derived candidates to canonical core without manual review.
default_policy.default_recommendation: Do not include unreviewed candidates in default recommendations.
default_policy.snippet_gate: Only transcribed unreviewed candidates may generate snippets with --allow-experimental; figure-derived candidates remain blocked.
